root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_024000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_024000.memname, vr_nsk_010_024000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_024000.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_024000.approve_date, vr_nsk_010_024000.approve_id, vr_nsk_010_024000.mem_type_code, vr_nsk_010_024000.mem_type_desc, vr_nsk_010_024000.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_024000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_024000.resignation_approve_date FROM vr_nsk_010_024000 where 1=1 and vr_nsk_010_024000.approve_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
